task_completion.description: Add the disk image gps_logger.dd as a data source in the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Add Data Source' wizard showing '/home/ga/evidence/gps_logger.dd' being selected, or the Data Sources tree in the main UI listing 'gps_logger.dd'.

task_completion.description: Locate and view the extracted GPS trackpoints within the Autopsy interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy interface showing 'GPS Trackpoints' under 'Extracted Content' or 'Results' in the tree view, with a table displaying latitude, longitude, and timestamps.

task_completion.description: Export the extracted GPS trackpoints to a CSV file at /home/ga/Reports/trackpoints_export.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog in Autopsy exporting a CSV to the '/home/ga/Reports' directory, or a file manager/terminal showing 'trackpoints_export.csv' exists in that path.

task_completion.description: Record the findings of the latest trackpoint in /home/ga/Reports/SAR_Report.txt using the required format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing the file 'SAR_Report.txt' containing 'TOTAL_TRACKPOINTS: 4', 'LATEST_TIMESTAMP: 2024-05-12T15:30:00Z', 'LAST_KNOWN_LATITUDE: 44.430100', and 'LAST_KNOWN_LONGITUDE: -110.591500'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy graphical interface to perform the forensic analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the Autopsy GUI open and being interacted with, rather than the agent exclusively using command-line tools like sleuthkit or grep to extract the data.

integrity.description: The CSV export was generated using Autopsy's built-in export features.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of right-clicking the results table in Autopsy and selecting 'Export' or 'Save Table as CSV', rather than manually typing out a CSV file in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent actually viewed the correct trackpoint data in Autopsy before writing the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific coordinates (44.430100, -110.591500) and timestamp (2024-05-12T15:30:00Z) should be visible in the Autopsy results table in at least one screenshot prior to or during the creation of SAR_Report.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The ground truth data for the report is: TOTAL_TRACKPOINTS: 4, LATEST_TIMESTAMP: 2024-05-12T15:30:00Z, LAST_KNOWN_LATITUDE: 44.430100, LAST_KNOWN_LONGITUDE: -110.591500. The case name must be 'SAR_GPS_2024' and case number 'INV-SAR-008'. The evidence file is '/home/ga/evidence/gps_logger.dd'.
